reviews.comment: This gas station has the best staff ever. We had problems with our car battery and they didn’t hesitate but helped us to jumpstart the car even though it was not right there but down the road. We are so thankful!!

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención...y algo para destacar en el Service, olvidé mi teléfono en el mostrador por más de una hora y cuando regresé todavía estaba ahí y nadie lo había tocado...Bien por el personal de la estación y por los lugareños de Pto Pirámides

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service...and something to highlight about the service: I forgot my phone on the counter for over an hour, and when I returned it was still there and no one had touched it...Well done to the station staff and the locals of Puerto Pirámides.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURodjZYaFJREAE
